CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-01-2016 Off Calendar

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-13-2016 Continued To Nov-15-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: Vivian Lerche, Esq. specially appearing for Plaintiff. The CRC 3.1385 Order to Show Cause is re-set to NOV-15-2016 at 10:30 AM in Department 610. JUDGE JOHN K. STEWART; Clerk MOlopernes. Proceedings not reported. (610)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Payment Of Attorney'S Fees And Reimbursement Of Costs And Expenses
Off Calendar Aug-19-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF TREVOR HADDEN'S MOTION FOR PAYMENT OF ATTORNEY'S FEES AND REIMBURSEMENT OF COSTS AND EXPENSES.

No appearances. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: GRANTED in part and DENIED in part. The attorneys' fees and costs presented total $76,921. The Court has reviewed the entries. The Court reduces the first entry (for $3,240) - which is block-billed and thus hinders analysis - by 50% (see Bell v. Vista Unified School District (2001) 82 Cal.App.4th 672, 689). The award is therefore $75,301. Order signed. Judge: Richard Ulmer, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Reporter: Reyes F. Hunter, CSR 6576

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-20-2016 Continued To Sep-13-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: Philip Kilduff, Esq. appearing specially for Plaintiff. The CRC 3.1385 Order to Show Cause is re-set to Sep-13-2016 at 10:30 AM in Department 610. JUDGE JOHN K. STEWART; Clerk RWoods. Proceedings not reported. (610)
